t_ch: 呵呵…看她们的样子，让我也想起了一同被圣殿收养的姐妹。
t_en: Heh... Looking at them reminds me of my sisters who were also taken in by the temple.

t_ch: 事到如今，哀地里亚称颂死亡的祷文，已经成了荒唐的妄语。
t_en: At this point, the prayers that hail death in Aidonia have become nothing but absurd delusions.

t_ch: 但我仍旧相信，万物终归有走到尽头之时。那尽头可能是死亡，也可能是遗忘。但在那之前……
t_en: But I still believe that all things must come to an end. That end might be death, or to be forgotten. But until then...

t_ch: 不用再隔着树枝才能牵手，也不用再避讳拥抱。遐蝶姐姐，你还有什么想做但不能做的事吗？
t_en: We don't have to hold hands through a branch or avoid hugs anymore. Castorice, is there anything else you want to do but haven't been able to?

t_ch: 勾手指，挠痒痒…扳手腕？
t_en: Pinky promise, tickle fight... arm wrestling?

t_ch: 咦？
t_en: Huh?

t_ch: …呵呵。在那之前，还有许多许多事等着我们去做。
t_en: ...Hehe. Before that, we've got tons and tons of things waiting for us to do.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}阁下，这里有些吵闹，抱歉招待不周了。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, I apologize for the noise. Please excuse our poor hospitality.

t_ch: 姐妹关系很融洽嘛。
t_en: You sisters seem to get along well.

t_ch: 嗯…只是，我从小孤身长大，前往冥海后，也只身迎送来往灵魂。
t_en: Mhm... But I grew up alone, and after going to the Sea of Souls, I've been ferrying souls back and forth by myself.

t_ch: 忽然置身手足亲情的环抱，一时不知如何应对。
t_en: I don't know how to react to such a sudden affectionate embrace.

t_ch: 这也是幸福的烦恼。
t_en: That's a good problem to have.

t_ch: 只要微笑就可以了！
t_en: Just smile!

t_ch: 嗯…如你所言，{NICKNAME}阁下。这来之不易的安宁时光，我的确该好好珍惜才是。
t_en: Yes... As you say, {NICKNAME}. I should indeed cherish these hard-earned moments of peace.

t_ch: 还有时间写诗吗？
t_en: Still got time for poetry?

t_ch: 如你所见，有她们在身旁，想做的事情越来越多，很难有提笔的闲暇。
t_en: As you can see, with them by my side, there are more and more things I want to do, and it's hard to find time to pick up the pen.

t_ch: 不过，与她们相处的点点滴滴，也让我得到了灵感的眷顾。
t_en: Still, all those little moments spent with them have blessed me with inspiration.

t_ch: 或许…下次我们再见面的时候，已经有了一些可以与阁下分享的诗句了。
t_en: Perhaps... when we meet again, I'll have some verses to share with you.

t_ch: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
t_en: Is there anything you want me to remember?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}阁下，请你收下这副花冠。
t_en: Please accept this flower crown, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 哀地里亚的女孩会把花冠送给即将远行的旅人，祈祷花瓣的枯萎气息帮助旅人躲过塞纳托斯的窥探，平安回到故乡。
t_en: Girls in Aidonia give flower crowns to travelers who are about to embark on long journeys. They pray that the scent of the withered petals will help the traveler evade Thanatos's gaze and return home safely.

t_ch: 但愿它也能让你平安归来。
t_en: I hope it brings you back safely, too.

t_ch: 好好享受这一刻吧。
t_en: Savor this moment.

t_ch: 嗯…如果阁下想在这多停留片刻…我们也同样欢迎。
t_en: Hmm... if you'd like to stay here a bit longer... you're equally welcome.

t_ch: 灰宝，欢迎你！不过抱歉，我得先为二位伤者看诊，恐怕你得自己照顾自己一会儿了。
t_en: Welcome, Grayie! But I need to attend to the two patients first, so you'll have to take care of yourself for a while.

t_ch: 怎么还有人受伤？
t_en: Why are there still people getting hurt?

t_ch: 你说的伤者不会是…
t_en: Don't tell me the injured person is...

t_ch: 缇安，只是不小心……
t_en: Trianne, it was just an accident...

t_ch: 咳咳，灰子，看破不说破，你明不明白这个道理？
t_en: Ahem. Gray Mystery, you know the drill, if you see through something, keep it to yourself, got it?

t_ch: 呵呵…这里没有清洗者窥探，更没有黑潮造物侵扰，本该是没有病痛的温柔之乡。
t_en: Heh... This should be a peaceful haven, free of illness, with no Cleaners prying and no Black Tide Creatures lurking.

t_ch: 可架不住总有人闲不下来，要找些有趣的事情做呀。你们说是不是，缇安老师，飞宝？
t_en: But some people just can't sit still and are always looking for something fun to do. Isn't that right, Trianne, Ciphie?

t_ch: 飞、飞宝是什么！
t_en: Wh—What!? Ciphie?

t_ch: 我只是借此机会考验一下你的医术罢了。可别太得意忘形哦，树庭女孩。
t_en: I was just taking the chance to test your medical skills. Don't get too full of yourself, Grove girl.

t_ch: 说话不能没有礼貌，小飞儿。对医生，要尊重！
t_en: Mind your manners, Little Ciphy. Show some respect to the doctor!

t_ch: 你们都哪儿不舒服？
t_en: So, what's bothering you all?

t_ch: 好熟练的发言，看来灰宝对问诊流程也很熟悉呢。
t_en: Such a practiced response, looks like Grayie is well-versed in the examination routine too.

t_ch: 能让你们受伤，是何等劲敌？
t_en: What kind of formidable enemy could hurt you all?

t_ch: 不怪别人，是缇安，自己！
t_en: No one else is to blame, it was Trianne!

t_ch: 唔…事情是这样。缇安想要火箭，飞得更高更远！
t_en: Well... here's what happened. Trianne wanted a rocket to soar higher and farther!

t_ch: 但火力太大，缇安控制不住准头，火箭嗖地掉下来，砸到了缇安的脑袋……
t_en: But the firepower was too strong. Trianne lost control of her aim, and the rocket went whoosh as it fell, landing right on her head...

t_ch: 缇安老师，下次一定要小心躲开呀！
t_en: Trianne, make sure to dodge next time!

t_ch: 你呢，飞宝？知道事故的前因后果，医师才能作出更准确的判断哦。
t_en: And you, Ciphie? A doctor needs the full story to make an accurate diagnosis.

t_ch: 呃…这不是，闲着也是闲着嘛，我一时兴起，想给扎格列斯之手来个迭代。
t_en: Uh... well, I was just sitting around, so I thought I'd tweak the Hand of Zagreus on a whim.

t_ch: 没想到这小玩具准头不错，可火力不足。我刚玩得兴起，它竟然在半空熄火了。
t_en: Turns out, the little toy's aim was decent, but the firepower was lacking. Just when I was getting into it, it fizzled out midair.

t_ch: 小飞儿，你也砸到脑袋啦？
t_en: Little Ciphy, did you hit your head too?

t_ch: 那倒不是，它栽进了一帮元老里边。他们正在叽叽喳喳嚼舌根，这下炸了锅，追着我跑出半条街，害得我不小心踩着尾巴了。
t_en: Not exactly, it landed right in the middle of a group of elders. They were gossiping away when it happened, and it caused an uproar! They chased me halfway down the street, and I ended up stepping on my tail in the chaos.

t_ch: 很难说是不是故意的。
t_en: Hard to believe it wasn't on purpose.

t_ch: 我保证，这绝对是意外！至少这一回是。不过，我突然想到……
t_en: I swear, it was totally an accident! At least this time. But I just thought of something...

t_ch: 假如把两者组合起来呢？
t_en: What if we combine the two?

t_ch: 把两者组合起来，你的意思是……
t_en: Combine the two, you mean...

t_ch: 假如用扎格列斯之手为缇安阿姐的火箭导向——
t_en: If we use the Hand of Zagreus to guide big sis Trianne's rockets—

t_ch: 再用缇安的火箭，给怪手提供火力！这样，火箭一定能飞得又快又准！
t_en: Then use Trianne's rockets to give the Hand some firepower! That way, the rockets will fly faster and more accurately!

t_ch: 小飞儿，咱们，赶紧试试！也多谢你啦，小风堇！
t_en: Little Ciphy, let's try it right away! And thanks to you too, Cinny!

t_ch: 劳你费心啰，树庭女孩！
t_en: Thanks, Grove girl!

t_ch: 哈哈…就算是大地兽也拦不住呢，真拿她们没办法。
t_en: Haha... Even a dromas couldn't stop them. There's just no dealing with them.

t_ch: 不过灰宝，缇安老师和飞宝看起来这么有活力，也没必要担心啦。
t_en: But Grayie, Trianne, and Ciphie look so full of energy, there's no need to worry!

t_ch: 小小灰，还有没有什么办法，能让火箭飞得更高更远呢？
t_en: Little Gray, is there any other way to make the rocket fly higher and farther?

t_ch: 或许可以请教翼兽？
t_en: Maybe we could ask the winged beasts?

t_ch: 是呀！它们生活在天空，对风和气流，一定最熟悉了！
t_en: Yeah! They live in the sky, so they must know the winds and air currents better than anyone!

t_ch: 看来，得给小伊卡，多准备些野苹果了呢……
t_en: Looks like I'll need to prepare more wild apples for Little Ica...

t_ch: 还是更喜欢百界门！
t_en: I still prefer Century Gate!

t_ch: 百界门是很方便啦，但是，坐在火箭上，耳边都是呼呼的风声，完全是两种感觉！
t_en: Sure, the Century Gate is convenient and all, but sitting on a rocket with the wind whooshing past your ears, now that's a whole different experience!

t_ch: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
t_en: Is there anything you want me to remember?

t_ch: 被小小灰猜到了，*我们*的心思！该挑什么礼物，想了很久呢。
t_en: Little Gray saw right through us! We spent a long time deciding what gift to pick.

t_ch: 缇宁说，希望它能陪你一起入眠，不再害怕做噩梦。
t_en: Trinnon says she hopes it will keep you company as you sleep, so you won't be afraid of nightmares anymore.

t_ch: 缇宝说，希望能像天上的星星那样，永远陪伴在你身边。
t_en: Tribbie says she hopes to stay by your side forever, just like the stars in the sky.

t_ch: 所以，最后——锵锵！这是*我们*亲手缝的娃娃，很可爱吧？
t_en: So, finally, ta-da! This is the doll we sewed ourselves. Isn't it cute?

t_ch: 如果，小小灰想我们了，就捏一捏，娃娃吧！
t_en: If you ever miss us, just give the doll a little squeeze, Little Gray!

t_ch: 容我再思考一下。
t_en: Let me think about it.

t_ch: 嗯！小小灰的奇思妙想，总能给*我们*很多、很多启发呢。
t_en: Mhm! Little Gray's brilliant ideas always give us so much inspiration!

t_ch: 灰宝，看诊时间结束啦。我看看，接下来的安排是…唔，下午茶时间！
t_en: Grayie, consultation hours are over! Let me see, next on the schedule is... Ah, afternoon tea time!

t_ch: 又重操旧业了！
t_en: Back to the old grind!

t_ch: 是呀，要多谢缇安老师和灰宝。不然，我的医术可都要生疏了。
t_en: Yeah, I have to thank Trianne and Grayie. Otherwise, my medical skills would've gone rusty.

t_ch: 她们就这么走了？
t_en: They just left like that?

t_ch: 病人能够活蹦乱跳地离开，对于医生来说，这就是最好的消息了！
t_en: For a doctor, there's no better news than seeing their patients leave alive and kicking!

t_ch: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
t_en: Is there anything you want me to remember?

t_ch: 希望铭记的东西…呀，看灰宝期盼的表情，是想要翁法罗斯纪念品，对吧？
t_en: Something to remember...? Oh, judging by Grayie's eager expression, you want an Amphoreus souvenir, right?

t_ch: 正好，瞧，这是昏光庭院的新产品——小伊卡限量周边！本来已经被抢完了，幸好我自己还留着一个，灰宝就把它捎回家吧！
t_en: Perfect timing! Look, this is Twilight Courtyard's new product, Limited Edition Little Ica merch! They were all sold out, but luckily I kept one for myself. Here, Grayie, take it home with you!

t_ch: 最精妙的设计是，只要轻轻一捏，它就能用小伊卡的声音唱歌哦！你听——嘟嘟嘟嘟，嘟~嘟~嘟嘟——
t_en: The most ingenious part of the design is that with just a gentle squeeze, it can sing in Little Ica's voice! Listen—Doot-doot-doot-doot, doot~doot~doot-doot—

t_ch: 嘻，是不是特别地可爱？
t_en: Hehe, isn't it super adorable?

t_ch: 我还会来庭院做客的。
t_en: I'll come visit the courtyard again.

t_ch: 好呀！我会为灰宝准备好茶点的，要常来哦！
t_en: Great! I'll prepare some snacks and tea for Grayie, so make sure to visit often!

t_ch: 灰子，扎格列斯之手迭代后应该换个更酷的名字。不如…就叫赛法利娅之手吧！
t_en: Gray Mystery, once the Hand of Zagreus gets its upgrade, it needs a cooler name. How does the Hand of Cifera sound?

t_ch: 巴特鲁斯知道这个决定吗？
t_en: Does Bartholos know about this decision?

t_ch: 它呀，好言相劝几句，再拿点宝贝出来闻闻，总会理解我的苦衷的！
t_en: With a bit of sweet talk and some goodies to sniff, they'll understand my reasoning!

t_ch: 总觉得元老院又要遭殃了。
t_en: I've got a feeling the Council of Elders is in for trouble again.

t_ch: 每有一只赛法利娅之手通过测试，就会有一群元老受到伤害……
t_en: For every Hand of Cifera that passes the test, a group of elders gets hurt...

t_ch: 但这么做是为了探索群星，为了翁法罗斯的明天！这点小牺牲，他们会理解的。
t_en: But it's all for exploring the stars, for Amphoreus' tomorrow! They'll understand a small sacrifice like this.

t_ch: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
t_en: Is there anything you want me to remember?

t_ch: 咦，灰子，你、你怎么说出这么肉麻的话！
t_en: Huh? Gray Mystery, h—how could you say something so mushy!

t_ch: 需要提醒才能记住的东西，恐怕本来就没有记住的必要吧？
t_en: If you need a reminder to remember something, maybe it wasn't worth remembering in the first place, huh?

t_ch: 如果你实在想留个纪念，就拿着这枚猫咪硬币吧，反正我也用不上它了。
t_en: If you really want a souvenir, take this cat coin. It's not like I have any use for it anyway.

t_ch: 别忘了我们啊，灰子！
t_en: Don't forget about us, Gray Mystery!

t_ch: 回聊回聊。
t_en: We'll talk later!

t_ch: 好，我和缇安阿姐继续去琢磨琢磨，下次给你看个大的！
t_en: Alright, Trianne and I will keep brainstorming, and next time we'll show you something really epic!

t_ch: 那刻夏老师，我准备好了。
t_en: Professor Anaxa, I'm ready.

t_ch: 现在的我，已经可以用这双手触碰生命了。与小大地兽们互动的方法，请完全教给我吧！
t_en: Now, with these hands, I can touch life itself. Please teach me everything about how to interact with little dromases!

t_ch: 很好，那就先教给你与小大地兽拉近距离的第一步：把手伸给它们，让它们凑近了嗅一嗅，对你的味道产生熟悉感……
t_en: Good, then let me teach you the first step to getting close to little dromases: hold out your hand, let them come over and sniff it, so they get used to your scent...

t_ch: 呜嗡……
t_en: Grumph...

t_ch: 等等，刚才的小大地兽去哪了？这一头也太过庞大了？
t_en: Wait, where did that little dromas go? This one is way too huge!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}？记得你曾孵化过一只小大地兽，莫非，我们面前的异兽，正是它最终长成的模样？
t_en: {NICKNAME}? I remember you once hatched a baby dromas. Could it be that the fantastic creature before us is what it has grown into?

t_ch: 这位可是唯一真神大地兽！
t_en: Behold, the one and only True Dromas God!

t_ch: 「兽皇」老师，你好。
t_en: Hello, Professor "Beast Emperor."

t_ch: 下次，请在我的学生不在的场合这样称呼。
t_en: Next time, please call me that only when my students aren't around.

t_ch: 啊…是它，传说中的「大地兽之祖」荒笛大人。
t_en: Ah... It's Lord Terravox, the legendary "ancestor of the dromases."

t_ch: 荒笛？吉奥里亚的至伟造物，无缘得见的历代大地之主，原来是它……
t_en: Terravox? The greatest creation of Georios, the unseen ruler of the earth through the ages... so it was you...

t_ch: 呜嗡……
t_en: Grumph...

t_ch: 它的身躯，可真是伟岸呀！披着金黄的铠甲，气势毫不输给我的玻吕刻斯……
t_en: Its stature is truly magnificent! Clad in golden armor, its presence rivals that of my Pollux...

t_ch: 不知道与小大地兽互动的方法在它身上还起不起效？那刻夏老师，再教给我第二步吧！咦？那刻夏老师？
t_en: I wonder if the method for interacting with little dromases will still work on it? Professor Anaxa, please teach me the next step! Huh? Professor Anaxa?

t_ch: 不必再有第二步了。
t_en: No need for a second step.

t_ch: 快！遐蝶，从侧面为它拍下特写，要全像素高清版。我来从正面拍。还有{NICKNAME}，麻烦你马上联系山之民商人，要大量新鲜的红土……
t_en: Quick! Castorice, get a close-up from side profile, full-resolution HD. I'll take the front shot. And {NICKNAME}, contact the Mountain Dweller merchants right away. We need massive amounts of fresh redsoil...

t_ch: 他太爱了。
t_en: He's way too into it.

t_ch: 我再帮你联系玩具商吧。
t_en: I'll help you contact the toy maker again.

t_ch: 啊！{NICKNAME}阁下的意思，是要委托玩具商做一套超稀有版定制大地兽玩偶？
t_en: Ah! So {NICKNAME}, you mean to commission a super-rare, custom dromas plushie from the toy maker?

t_ch: 拜托，我早就不是抱着大地兽玩偶入睡的五岁孩子了。
t_en: Come on, I'm not a five-year-old who falls asleep hugging a dromas plushie anymore.

t_ch: 我再帮你联系白厄吧。
t_en: I'll get in touch with Phainon for you again.

t_ch: 诶？
t_en: Huh?

t_ch: 扑哧…难道说，白厄阁下要重写一篇「论大地兽优于泰坦」的论文了？
t_en: Pfft... Don't tell me Phainon is about to rewrite another study on "On Dromases' Superiority to Titans"?

t_ch: 呵呵，好生热闹，是吾未曾同行过的小友们呐？对我的模样，你们很稀奇？
t_en: Hehe, what a lively bunch! Are you new companions I've never traveled with before? My appearance must have caught your eye?

t_ch: 呀！原来大地兽会说话，不对，以万灵之祖的身份，不会说话才奇怪。
t_en: Ah! So dromases can speak!? Wait, no, as the ancestor of all souls, it'd be stranger if it couldn't speak.

t_ch: 早就听说瑟希斯的门下出了一位喜好大地兽的学者，但我的故事，恐怕要让你们失望了。
t_en: I've heard of a scholar under Cerces who's really into dromases, but I'm afraid my story might disappoint you.

t_ch: 哦？
t_en: Oh?

t_ch: 哎，大地兽那些温厚、朴实的性情，我不但一度抛弃了它们，还做出过被老友吉奥刻勒斯视为「背叛」的事情，也险些让最后的逐火万劫不复……
t_en: Ah, the gentle and honest nature of the dromases... Not only did I once abandon them, but I also did something my old friend Geocles called proclaimed a betrayal, and I nearly brought eternal ruin upon the final Flame-Chase...

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈哈哈，不错，很不错！
t_en: Hahahahaha, good, very good!

t_ch: 你说的这些事，我也全都做过。
t_en: I've done all those things you mentioned, too.

t_ch: 那刻夏老师…老师真的太喜欢大地兽了……
t_en: Professor Anaxa... he really loves dromases way too much...

t_ch: 听说荒笛也在树庭仰望过「星空」，遮蔽双眼的永昼辉光退去后，天外真正的星空依旧令人着迷。
t_en: I heard that even Terravox once gazed at the stars in the Grove. After the blinding radiance of Eternal Day faded, the true starry sky beyond is still mesmerizing.

t_ch: 已经有新的灵感了吗？
t_en: Got any new inspiration yet?

t_ch: 不错，蛰伏在吕枯耳戈斯记忆中的年岁里，我得以窥见天外知识的一角。
t_en: That is accurate. During the years I lay dormant in Lycurgus's memories, I caught a glimpse of knowledge from beyond the sky.

t_ch: …不得不说，大受震撼。
t_en: ...I must say, I'm absolutely stunned.

t_ch: 无从读起，困惑了吧？
t_en: Don't know where to start? Confusing, isn't it?

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈哈——困惑？
t_en: Haha hahaha, confused?

t_ch: 知识过载，害怕了吧？
t_en: Knowledge overload, scared yet?

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈哈——害怕？
t_en: Haha hahaha, scared?

t_ch: 这是对我迄今以来全部工作的最好奖赏！
t_en: This is the best reward for all my work so far!

t_ch: 还以为你会对大地兽祛魅。
t_en: I thought you'd strip away the mystique of the dromases.

t_ch: 为何？无论荒笛做过什么，它都是承载过「大地」之重的半神。
t_en: Why? No matter what Terravox has done, it is still a demigod that once bore the weight of Earth.

t_ch: 我只能说，每个人心中都有一头大地兽——凝视它就仿佛凝视自己。
t_en: All I can say is that there's a dromas in everyone's heart, and gazing at it is like gazing at yourself.

t_ch: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
t_en: Is there anything you want me to remember?

t_ch: 拿着它吧。「贤者之石」——人们曾称它为炼金术至高的冠冕，获得它便能得到此世的一切智慧。但与整个宇宙的知识相比，那不过是冰山一角。
t_en: Take this. This is the "Philosopher's Stone." Once hailed as the supreme crown of alchemy, possessing it meant gaining all wisdom of this world. But compared to the knowledge of the entire universe, it's merely the tip of an iceberg.

t_ch: 没有任何东西能让你获得智慧，除了「我们对智慧还一无所知」的认知。
t_en: Nothing can grant you wisdom except the realization that "we know nothing of wisdom at all."

t_ch: 希望它能让你铭记这一点。
t_en: I hope this will help you remember that.

t_ch: 祝你和大地兽幸福！
t_en: May you and the dromas be happy together!

t_ch: 呵，你越喜欢大地兽，就越会与大地兽产生深刻的羁绊，正如对世界本身的研究——心怀求索，真理自能究明！
t_en: Heh. The more you cherish dromases, the deeper your bond will grow. It's just like studying the world itself. Keep your heart filled with curiosity, and the truth will reveal itself!

t_ch: 这就是大地兽教给我们的最朴素的道理。
t_en: Such is the primal wisdom the dromases have bestowed upon us.

t_ch: 呜嗡…嚼嚼…翁法罗斯万物生灵现在都有了自己的归宿，我也可以安心享受美味的红土了。
t_en: Grumph... Nomnom... Now that all the Amphorean creatures have found their places, I can finally enjoy my delicious redsoil in peace.

t_ch: 大地兽之王也爱吃红土？
t_en: Even the Dromas King likes redsoil too?

t_ch: 或许就像法吉娜贪恋它的秘酿一样，我也天然地喜爱这从「大地」熔炉中诞生的物事呐！
t_en: Perhaps, just as Phagousa can't resist their ambrosia, I've always had a natural fondness for what's born from the furnace of Earth!

t_ch: 你对那刻夏的喜欢怎么看？
t_en: What do you think of Anaxa's love for dromases?

t_ch: 呜嗡…我不过是一头曾在悖谬的道路上奔驰的愚兽，那名学者却视之如常。
t_en: Grumph... I'm just a foolish beast who once galloped down the path of paradox, yet that scholar treated it as perfectly normal.

t_ch: 依我所见，他不像人们形容的那般苛刻，反倒是位耐心的好老师。
t_en: From what I've seen, he's not as harsh as people make him out to be. On the contrary, he's quite patient and a good teacher.

t_ch: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
t_en: Is there anything you want me to remember?

t_ch: 当然，我没忘记要把这样东西郑重地交给你，和如今那位「大地」的新神——
t_en: Of course. I haven't forgotten to hand this over to you solemnly, and to that new God of "Earth"—

t_ch: 翁法罗斯的持明卵？
t_en: An Amphorean Vidyadhara egg?

t_ch: 你也有蜕生之法？
t_en: Are you also capable of hatching rebirth?

t_ch: 呵呵，这只是一枚普通的大地兽蛋。
t_en: Hehe. It's just a regular dromas egg.

t_ch: 从前我和老友吉奥刻勒斯一同仰望过树庭的「星空」，每一颗星星都意味着一片更为深远的土地，我对天外群星的向往也从那时开始……
t_en: Long ago, I gazed at the "starry sky" of the Grove with my old friend Geocles. Each star represented a distant land, and that's when my yearning for the stars beyond the sky began...

t_ch: 倘若有一天它能孵化，从中诞生的新生命，或许是翁法罗斯第一个真正步入银河的生命吧？
t_en: If it hatches one day, perhaps the new life born from within will be the first Amphorean life to truly step into the cosmos?

t_ch: 小心牙口啊。
t_en: Careful with your teeth.

t_ch: 呜嗡…放心，我还没有老迈到那个份上。
t_en: Grumph... Don't worry. I'm not that old yet.

t_ch: 还以为和大地兽的互动教学课，会更循序渐进一点，没想到一来就是最重量级的嘉宾呀！
t_en: I thought the dromas interaction lesson would be more gradual, but wow, we're starting off with the heavyweight guest right away!

t_ch: 触摸大地兽之王的感觉如何？
t_en: How does it feel to touch the Dromas King?

t_ch: 要说皮肤的质感，比想象中更粗糙，还有许多旧日的伤疤。荒笛大人，一定经历过无数场艰难的征战吧……
t_en: The texture of the skin is rougher than I imagined, with many old scars. Lord Terravox must have been through countless difficult battles...

t_ch: 大地兽也很喜欢你呢。
t_en: The dromas seems quite fond of you, too.

t_ch: 很久以前，我曾收殓过一枚大地兽的骨片，用它做了一只骨笛，吹奏起来的声音很是低沉忧伤，仿佛轻轻触碰到了大地兽的灵魂。
t_en: Long ago, I came across a bone fragment from a dromas as a mortician and crafted it into a bone flute. When played, it produced a deep, melancholic sound, as if softly brushing against the very soul of the dromas.

t_ch: 从前的我只能用这种方式触碰它们，还好，现在可以放心和它们玩耍了。
t_en: It was the only way I could touch them back then. Thankfully, now I can play with them without worry.

t_ch: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
t_en: Is there anything you want me to remember?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}阁下，请你收下这副花冠。
t_en: Please accept this flower crown, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 哀地里亚的女孩会把花冠送给即将远行的旅人，祈祷花瓣的枯萎气息帮助旅人躲过塞纳托斯的窥探，平安回到故乡。
t_en: Girls in Aidonia give flower crowns to travelers who are about to embark on long journeys. They pray that the scent of the withered petals will help the traveler evade Thanatos's gaze and return home safely.

t_ch: 但愿它也能让你平安归来。
t_en: I hope it brings you back safely, too.

t_ch: 下去找轻量级的玩吧！
t_en: Why not start with something more lightweight?

t_ch: 如果是小大地兽，我说不定还可以把它们抱起来，这算不算一种更用力的「拥抱」呢？
t_en: If it's a baby dromas, I might be able to pick them up. Would that count as a more... forceful kind of "embrace"?

t_ch: 征途结束，功业也已告毕。暂时收起压在心头的烦忧，陪我对酌一杯吧，凯撒。
t_en: The campaign is over, and our deeds accomplished. Set aside the worries weighing on your mind for now, and share a drink with me, Imperator.

t_ch: 我今日带的是千载难逢的珍酿，倘若错过了，可得再等一千年呢。
t_en: I brought a once-in-a-millennium vintage today. Miss it, and you'll have to wait another thousand years.

t_ch: 呵呵，剑旗爵，千年对我们的征程而言，不过弹指一瞬。
t_en: Heh. Dux Gladiorum, a thousand years is but a mere blink of an eye in our grand campaign.

t_ch: 这份好意我心领了，如此珍馐，替我将它赏赐给诸臣子吧。吟风爵会喜欢这份礼物。
t_en: I appreciate the thought, but please gift such a treasure to my ministers instead. I'm sure Dux Carminum will cherish this gift.

t_ch: 我早知凯撒会如此推脱，过来前便与他们开过庆功宴了。
t_en: I knew you'd try to weasel out of it, so I already celebrated with them before coming here.

t_ch: 哦？呵…看来这回是我棋差一招。
t_en: Oh? Heh... Guess it's a tactical oversight on my part this time.

t_ch: 但身为君王，我必须承担每步棋的后果，任由自己耽溺在蜜酿之中，只会满盘皆输。所以，我依旧不能喝。
t_en: But as a king, I must bear the weight of every move on the board. Indulging myself in honey brew would only lead to total defeat. So, I still can't drink it.

t_ch: 没准会有新灵感？
t_en: Might it spark some new inspiration?

t_ch: 确实，酣饮过后，总是会有新的主意像气泡那样从思绪里升起。
t_en: Indeed. New ideas always rise from the mind after a good drink, like fizzy bubbles.

t_ch: 不妨更信任你的臣下吧。
t_en: You can try trusting your vassals more.

t_ch: 即便凯撒稍作歇息，逐火军中的诸位也能各司其职，无需太过记挂。
t_en: Even if you take a short break, everyone in the Flame-Chase Army can handle their duties just fine. There's no need to worry excessively.

t_ch: 二位倒是都言之有理，但……
t_en: You both make fair points, but...

t_ch: 既然如此，也不必再勉强。看来这瓶珍酿，只能由我们享用了呢，小灰鱼儿。
t_en: Well then, no need to force it. Seems this fine vintage will just have to be enjoyed by just us alone, Little Gray Fry.

t_ch: 不喜欢就算了吧！
t_en: No pressure if you don't want it!

t_ch: 毕竟我们又不是什么恶魔 。
t_en: We're not gonna force it upon you, after all.

t_ch: 呵。罢了，清醒的头脑固然重要，但若扫了爱臣们享受宴席的兴致，也是得不偿失。
t_en: Heh. Oh well. Clarity of mind is important, but to spoil my dear subjects' joy in the feast would be a greater loss still.

t_ch: 那么——敬翁法罗斯的明天。
t_en: Well then, here's to Amphoreus's tomorrow.

t_ch: …嘶…还真是涩口哪。
t_en: Tch... quite the astringent bite.

t_ch: 小灰鱼，你也要来一杯吗？
t_en: Little Gray Fry, care for a cup as well?

t_ch: 给我满上！
t_en: Fill 'er up!

t_ch: 呵，真是豪气。蜜酿确实该一饮而尽。
t_en: Heh, now that's the spirit. A honey brew should indeed be downed in one go.

t_ch: 看到了凯撒的另一面呢。
t_en: Wow, this is another side of the Imperator.

t_ch: 站得越高，便越是容易被当作职权的化身，从而忽视那些细微却平凡的部分。
t_en: The higher you stand, the easier it is for people to see you only the mantle of power, overlooking those small yet ordinary details.

t_ch: 倘若你有空闲，请多和凯撒聊聊吧，小灰鱼儿。
t_en: When you have time, Little Gray Fry, do chat with the Imperator more.

t_ch: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
t_en: Is there anything you want me to remember?

t_ch: 值得铭记的东西…小灰鱼是打算把它带去天外之海吗？也好……
t_en: Something worth remembering... Little Gray Fry, do you plan to take it to the sea beyond the sky? That works too...

t_ch: 这枚骨螺来自斯缇科西亚的海床，是我许多年前采撷的，历经风霜仍保持光洁。
t_en: I collected this shell fossil from the seabed of Styxia many years ago, and it still retains its pristine shine despite weathering through snow and storms.

t_ch: 请务必好好珍藏——不如，就摆在你的床头吧？
t_en: Make sure to treasure it well. How about displaying it by your bedside?

t_ch: 待会再来找你。
t_en: I'll catch up with you later.

t_ch: 好啊，小灰鱼。这次可不要让我等太久。
t_en: Gladly, Little Gray Fry. Don't keep me waiting too long this time.

t_ch: 宴饮的请求我已应承，现在，你们也不该再推搪我对弈一局的邀请了吧？
t_en: I've accepted your proposal for a drink, surely you two will quit stalling on my invitation for a chess game, right?

t_ch: 不分出胜负不罢休！
t_en: We play until there's a winner!

t_ch: 好，看来我也不得不慎重对待，拿出些真本事了。
t_en: Very well. Seems I'll have to get serious and show you what I'm capable of.

t_ch: 下棋有什么诀窍吗？
t_en: Any tricks to winning at chess?

t_ch: 下棋是一门「牺牲」的艺术。每一次牵制、截杀、胜利…都需要以棋子的生死为代价换取，哪怕是「王」也不能例外。
t_en: Chess is the art of "sacrifice." Each pin, capture, and triumph is purchased with the death of a piece... Even the "King" is no exception.

t_ch: 为了赢，你愿意牺牲多少？这是在落子前，必须问自己的问题。
t_en: How much are you willing to sacrifice to win? That's the question you must ask yourself before making a move.

t_ch: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
t_en: Is there anything you want me to remember?

t_ch: 当然有——我的「后」棋。
t_en: Of course there is. My "Queen" piece.

t_ch: 「后」是最强的棋子，来去如风，势不可挡。希望你今后的旅程，也能如它一般自由。
t_en: The Queen is the most powerful chess piece, moving like the wind, unstoppable in its path. May your future journey be just as free as it is.

t_ch: 我先准备准备…
t_en: Let me get ready first...

t_ch: 休憩之时，不妨翻阅些棋谱典册，做好充分准备后再来吧。
t_en: Why not study some chess manuals during your break? Come back when you're well-prepared.

t_ch: 哎呀呀呀，瞧瞧你们，怎么把自己弄得这么狼狈？我在临行前，不是留下了那么多妙策吗？桀桀桀——果然没了我还是不行呀！
t_en: Well, well, well, look at you all! How did you get yourselves into such a mess? Didn't I leave you with so many brilliant strategies before I left? Hehehe... guess you really can't do without me!

t_ch: 狼狈？巴特鲁斯，你如今顶着一副…葡萄样貌，真不知有何立场说这些尖言冷语。
t_en: "Mess," you say? Bartholos, with that... grape-like appearance of yours, I don't think you're in any position to throw shade.

t_ch: 嘁，你这只知道死磕的莽夫，要是听我的，别死守那些沦陷在即的城邦，少说还能延长一千年的黎明！
t_en: Tch, says the brute who only knows how to butt heads! If you'd just listened to me instead of desperately clinging to those doomed city-states, we could've extended the Dawn by at least a thousand years!

t_ch: 用你那些欺瞒的伎俩，换几百年苟且偷生？人皆有一死，但切不可失却尊严。
t_en: Using your deceitful tricks for a few hundred years of mere survival? All men must face death, but never should they forfeit their dignity.

t_ch: 唉，我早就知道，你其实打心眼里喜欢「纷争」吧？一天不和怪物摔角，就手痒得睡不着觉？
t_en: Ahh... I knew all along that you just love Strife deep down, don't you? Can't even sleep a wink unless you've wrestled with monsters, huh?
You—

t_ch: 呵呵…{NICKNAME}阁下，让您看到这难堪的一幕，着实让人窘迫。
t_en: Heh... my apologies, {NICKNAME}. You've had to witness such an unseemly quarrel.

t_ch: 不过听着他们争吵，好像又回到了那段逐火的时光。不知多少个夜晚，正是这些嘈杂的声响，和篝火一同伴着我们入睡。
t_en: But listening to their bickering takes me back to those days of Flame-Chase. On countless nights, these noisy sounds lulled us to sleep along with the campfire.

t_ch: 很少看到格奈乌斯动怒。
t_en: It's rare to see Gnaeus lose his temper.

t_ch: 咦，是不是「理智」的碎片还没有拼回来？本大爷帮你去找找？
t_en: Aww, is your "Reason" fragment still wandering out there? Need me to go find it for you?

t_ch: 感情都是吵出来的。
t_en: Some bonds are forged through fighting.

t_ch: 看在这些年里，没少偷吃尼卡多利贡品的份上，姑且就原谅他吧。
t_en: Given all those offerings to Nikador I've pilfered over the years, guess I can let this one slide.

t_ch: 巴特鲁斯，那些计策，吾等也曾想尝试，但时事变转，要全部实现着实困难。
t_en: Bartholos, we've considered those strategies before, but with how things have changed, implementing them all would be rather difficult.

t_ch: 汝计划以悬锋为饵，可自城邦陷落后，那些厮杀反而成为滋养疯狂的养料。
t_en: You planned to use Kremnos as bait, but after the city fell, those massacres only became sustenance for madness.

t_ch: 巴特鲁斯阁下，您引冥河淹没黑潮造物的设想也未能实践…待到我能够掌控冥河时才发现，黑潮本是生死论外之物。
t_en: Lord Bartholos, your plan to submerge the Black Tide Creatures in the River of Souls couldn't be realized either... When I took command of the river, I learned the black tide exists beyond life and death itself.

t_ch: 桀桀，不说这些，小波吕茜亚。把姐姐送向来世，这手真是巧妙呀，颇得我的真传！
t_en: Hehehe. Enough about that. Little Polyxia, sending your dear sister to the next life was indeed genius. You surely learned from the best!

t_ch: 若是没有这出戏码，恐怕那来世的继任者，也没那么容易发现轮回的真相。
t_en: I doubt our successors in the next life would've discovered the truth of the cycles so easily without that move of yours.

t_ch: 至少答案是对的。
t_en: At least the answer was right.

t_ch: 无数选择，才让我们走到今天。
t_en: It took countless choices for us to reach this day.

t_ch: 吾等的努力，并没有白费。事到如今，终于可以下此论断了哪。
t_en: Our efforts have not been in vain. At long last, I can finally say that with certainty.

t_ch: 这是一口凝结着记忆的喷泉，水波中隐约可见你熟悉的前代泰坦们的身影。
t_en: This is a fountain crystallized with memories. You can catch faint glimpses of those past Titans in the rippling water.

t_ch: 你将「时光硕果」投入泉水，那些身影逐渐在空气中成形……
t_en: You cast the Fruit of Time into the fountain, and those figures gradually materialize in the air...

t_ch: 请支持火花，请支持火花谢谢咪！
t_en: Please support Sparxie, please support Sparxie, thank youuuu!

t_ch: 没听说过，什么火？
t_en: Never heard of this. What Spa?

t_ch: 是火花，虚拟直播主火花。
t_en: It's Sparxie, the VStreamer Sparxie.

t_ch: 哈花？
t_en: Arxie?

t_ch: 火花！
t_en: Sparxie!

t_ch: 火哈？
t_en: Sexy?

t_ch: 你接着喝吧。
t_en: I'll leave you to your drinks.

t_ch: 好嘞。
t_en: Alrighty.

t_ch: 有没有兴趣去后面的收藏室看看？那边可是堆满了全宇宙的乐子。
t_en: Would you be interested in checking out the collection room in the back? It's packed with all sorts of fun stuff from across the universe!

t_ch: 哎哟，怎么都在说这个笑话啊，哪有什么收藏室，后面不就是些厕所嘛。
t_en: Ugh, why's everyone going on about that joke? There's no collection room back there, it's just some bathrooms.

t_ch: 你这口气，搞得跟这里是传说中的假面愚者酒馆一样…下一步，你是不是要跟我说你也是个假面愚者了？
t_en: The way you're talking, you're making this place sound like the legendary Fool's Tavern... What's next, are you gonna tell me you're a Masked Fool too?

t_ch: 是啊，你猜的可真准啊，哈哈哈哈。
t_en: Yeah, you're spot on with that guess, hahaha.

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈哈。
t_en: Hahahahaha.

t_ch: 哎，不好意思，我女儿突然跑没影了，你有看到一个小女孩跑过去吗？
t_en: Hey, sorry to disturb, but my daughter suddenly ran off. Did you happen to see a little girl run by?

t_ch: 我有印象，她刚往那边去了…朋友，你口袋里的骰子露出来了，你也打银河战力党？
t_en: I think I saw her go that way... Hey buddy, those dice are peeking out of your pocket. You play Cosmicon Collective too?

t_ch: 嘿，这我就不困了，来一局？我可是战胜过「老者」的人！
t_en: Ooh, I'm wide awake now! Fancy a round? I'll have you know I've beaten the "Elder" before!

t_ch: 可以是可以，你不找找你女儿？
t_en: I mean, sure, but shouldn't you look for your daughter?

t_ch: 她不行，银河战力党这块，她还有得学呢。
t_en: She's not up to it, she's still got a lot to learn when it comes to the Cosmicon Collective.

t_ch: 听说你有病？你有病吗？
t_en: I heard you're sick? Are you sick?

t_ch: 对对，我有病，我有大病！
t_en: Yes! I'm sick, I'm very, very sick!

t_ch: 你这病，能治吗？
t_en: This sickness... Can it be cured?

t_ch: 治不了，没得治！
t_en: It's incurable, no cure exists!

t_ch: 太好了，我就喜欢没救的病，给我来一例！
t_en: Great! I love hopeless cases. I'll have one, please!

t_ch: 看着这四通八达，和蜘蛛网一样的列车时刻表，我就开始头疼…哎哟，好晕，好晕。
t_en: Looking at this Express schedule that twists and turns like a spider's web is giving me a headache... Ugh, I'm so, so dizzy.

t_ch: 这位乘客，请问您需要医疗协助吗？
t_en: Excuse me, passenger, do you require medical assistance?

t_ch: 哦，不是，我晕，我没晕。
t_en: Oh, no no. I'm dizzy, I'm not dizzy.

t_ch: 你帮他下载个导航软件到手机上，他就不晕了。
t_en: Just help him download a navigation app on his phone and there'll be no problem.

t_ch: 我的人生结束了。
t_en: My life is over.

t_ch: 好，车快来了，限你三十秒复活。
t_en: Alright, the ride's almost here. You've got thirty seconds to revive yourself.

t_ch: 你…你就不问为什么吗？
t_en: Y—You're not gonna ask why?

t_ch: 第一次是抽卡暴死，第二次是后天考试，你还有什么花样？
t_en: The first time was death by pulling capsules, then it was death by an upcoming exam. What other tricks have you got up your sleeve?

t_ch: 这次是真的，火花她，她今晚要休息，暂停直播一回，我可怎么活啊！
t_en: This time it's for real. Sparxie, she's... she's taking the night off, there's no stream tonight. How am I supposed to survive!?

t_ch: …有时候真搞不懂你们主播粉丝。
t_en: ...Sometimes I really don't get you streamer fans.

t_ch: 你知道吗？我爱你，就像热爱生命一样。
t_en: You know what? I love you as much as I love life itself.

t_ch: 俺也一样，亲爱的。
t_en: Same here, darling.

t_ch: 我真的很爱你，就像爱牛肉面那么多。
t_en: I really love you, like how much I'm obsessed with beef noodle soup.

t_ch: 俺也一样，亲爱的。
t_en: Same here, darling.

t_ch: 你比我见到的任何一个人都更有魅力。
t_en: You've got more charm than anyone I've ever met.

t_ch: 怎么会呢，亲爱的，你一定是没见过火花……
t_en: Oh no, sweetie, you must've never met Sparxie...

t_ch: 这不是星穹列车的一比一比例模型吗？做得挺还原啊——
t_en: Isn't this a 1:1 scale model of the Astral Express? Pretty faithful re-creation...

t_ch: 有没有可能，这不是模型？
t_en: Wait, what if this isn't a model?

t_ch: *倒吸一口凉气*——难道说，我赶上真人版电影的拍摄现场了？太酷了！
t_en: *gasps* ...Wait, did I just walk onto a live-action movie set? That's so cool!

t_ch: …乐子神在上，保佑这个追星都不会追的人永远不要发现真相吧。
t_en: ...O Laughter above, may this person who doesn't even know how to stan properly never discover the truth.

t_ch: 冒昧打听一下，听说你们幽灵能够画圈圈诅咒别人，让他们不幸连连，乃至意外身故？
t_en: Mind if I ask? I've heard you ghosts can draw circles to curse people, bringing them endless bad luck or even... accidental death?

t_ch: 哪里的话，你我一样都是幻造种，怎么可能会有这种事。
t_en: Come on, we're both imagenae. There's no way that could happen.

t_ch: 哈哈，我就知道，传闻不可信。
t_en: Ha! I knew it, the rumors are total BS.

t_ch: 是啊，幻造种也要遵守法律，要是随便诅咒别人，治安官可是会生气的。
t_en: That's true. Even imagenae are not above the law. If they start hexing people left and right, the security officers aren't just going to sit back and watch.

t_ch: 自动售卖机里面真的没有人吗？
t_en: Is there really no one inside the automatic vending machine?

t_ch: …你被幽灵上身了？怎么问出这么显而易见的问题？
t_en: ...Are you possessed by a ghost or something? Why are you asking such an obvious question?

t_ch: 我看匿名论坛说，泊地站的这台售货机很聪明。所有商品都是随机口味，但又总会符合当下顾客的喜好。
t_en: I saw on an anonymous forum that the vending machine at Perdido Station is pretty smart. All the items come in random flavors, but somehow they always match what the customer's craving at the moment.

t_ch: 这…该不会真让你说中了吧？
t_en: Wait... Are you saying you actually got it right?

t_ch: 喂喂！我当然是活的啊！你不能因为我长成自动售卖机的样子就把我开除幻造籍啊！
t_en: Hey! I'm alive, you know! Just because I look like a vending machine doesn't mean you can revoke my imagenae status!

t_ch: 我的密码！你在哪里啊？
t_en: Hey, password! Where are you!?

t_ch: 你喊再大声也没用，密码又不会说话。
t_en: Yell all you want, your password's not gonna answer you back.

t_ch: 是<unbreak>3101</unbreak>，下次再忘记，我就要收手续费了！
t_en: It's <unbreak>3101</unbreak>! Forget it again, I'll be charging you a fee!

t_ch: 完了，你怎么是幻造种？我上次存进去的货你没看到吧？
t_en: Oh great, you're an imagenae? You didn't see the stuff I stashed here last time, did you?

t_ch: 「泊地站见，我的宝~」…终于能见到我的小黄豆本人了，好激动啊。
t_en: "See you at Perdido Station, babe~" ...I can finally meet my Little Soybean in person. I'm so stoked!

t_ch: 她会是怎样的人呢？元气活泼的轻脚？娇小可爱的月眠？该，该不会是机铠吧？那我也能接受！
t_en: What kind of person will she be? An energetic and lively lightpaw? A petite and adorable moonlull? S—Surely not a mechatron, right? Well, that's acceptable, too!

t_ch: 嗯？这位噗噜，你有什么事吗？
t_en: Hm? What can I do for you, ploo?

t_ch: 你就是「刺刺盆栽」？
t_en: So you're Prickly Potted Plant?

t_ch: …小黄豆？
t_en: ...Little Soybean?

t_ch: 嗯嗯，宝你不是说要带人家去看电影吗？快走吧~
t_en: Mm-hmm, babe, didn't you say you were gonna take me to the movies? Let's go already~
...Alright.

t_ch: 你觉得这次谁能成为谒者？
t_en: Who do you think will happen to the Supplicant this time?

t_ch: 独立直播主之类的吧？我倒是很希望幻月游戏能催生一些原本不太可能实现的企划。
t_en: Maybe, independent streamers and stuff? I'm really hoping Phantasmoon Games can help bring some projects to life that wouldn't have been possible otherwise.

t_ch: 我倒是觉得这次的谒者名单会远远超出我们的预想…比如星穹列车的那些无名客？就跟以往的幻月游戏一样，每几届总会有个外地人乱入。
t_en: I have a feeling the list of Supplicants this time is going to be way longer than we expect... Like those Nameless from the Astral Express? Just like past Phantasmoon Games, there are always some outsider who crashes the party every few years.

t_ch: 实话告诉你们吧！曾经我也是个谒者，直到我在「唱名」前把面具弄丢了。
t_en: I'll level with you, I used to be a Supplicant too. But then I lost my mask right before the roll-call.

t_ch: 烂梗，不够好笑，哥们。
t_en: Lame joke, not funny enough, dude.

t_ch: 大家好，我们是刚刚出道的乐队「我爱幻造」！队里的所有成员都是前幻造师哦！
t_en: Hey everyone, we're the Loving Imagenesis, making our debut! All our members are former Imagenists!

t_ch: 创作歌曲的目的是为了抵制公司对于幻造师们的压迫！公司也认可我们的初衷和创意，给我们提供了大量赞助！请大家支持我们！
t_en: Our goal in writing these songs is to resist the IPC's oppression of all Imagenists! The IPC actually respects our vision and creativity, and they've even provided us with a massive sponsorship deal! Please, give us your support!

t_ch: 哦哦哦哦！我们爱你！！
t_en: Whooooo! We love you!

t_ch: 谢谢大家~请大家欣赏我们的第一首原创单曲——《凌晨起床合并你图层》！！
t_en: Thanks, everyone~ Please enjoy our first original single: Merging Your Layers at 4 AM!!!

t_ch: 当季新活动，买面包送手机流量啦，走过路过不要错过！
t_en: New seasonal promo: Buy bread, get free mobile data! Don't miss out, folks!

t_ch: 店内充值过百信用点手机话费，会附赠价值二十信用点的面包礼盒~和其他活动同时有效哦！
t_en: Top up over <unbreak>100</unbreak> credits on your phone bill in-store and get a complimentary bread giftbox worth <unbreak>20</unbreak> credits~ Can be combined with other promotions!

t_ch: 如果您没有手机，可以包下当日所有出炉面包，会赠送最新款的「橘子<unbreak>20</unbreak>」手机哦！
t_en: If you don't have a phone, just buy up all the bread for the day, and we'll throw in the latest "Orange <unbreak>20</unbreak>" phone for free!

t_ch: 只要在半小时内吃完新品「玻璃牙刷味可颂」并截图发至社交平台得到过千赞，即可抽取火花直播间会员奖励，先到先得啦！
t_en: Just finish our new Glass Toothbrush Croissant within half an hour, snap a screenshot, post it on social media and rack up over a thousand likes to get a chance to win an exclusive Sparxie livestream membership! First come, first served!

t_ch: 孩子，你在学校里一定要好好学习，这样直播的时候还可以选择科普类赛道。
t_en: My child, you gotta study hard in school. That way, you can choose the educational niche when you stream.

t_ch: 妈妈，为什么我不能直接当科学家呢？
t_en: Mom, why can't I just become a scientist right away?

t_ch: 妈妈是为了你好，科学家在二相乐园只配给公司打工，只有成为主播才能得到乐子神的庇佑。
t_en: Mommy's doing this for your own good. Scientists in Planarcadia can only slave away for the IPC, but if you become a streamer, you'll earn The Laughter's blessing.

t_ch: 我们家能不能出个网络红人，就全看你啦。
t_en: Whether our family can produce an internet celebrity or not is all up to you now.

t_ch: 雪砖、威化、巧克力雪糕…好贵啊！我只想吃6信用点就能买到的朋克洛德<unbreak>39</unbreak>种口味冰淇淋！
t_en: Ice cream bars, wafers, chocolate popsicles... They're all so expensive! I just wanna get that Punklorde <unbreak>39</unbreak> Ice Cream you can buy with 6 credits!

t_ch: 国民级品牌，你是会吃的。我想想，冰棍都堆在最下层，你可以翻找一下。
t_en: A national brand, good choice! Let me think... The popsicles are all down at the bottom, so you'll have to dig around for them.

t_ch: 是吗…我好像摸到了！但它冻得挺结实，我拿不出来……
t_en: Really...? I think I feel it! But it's frozen solid, I can't get it out...

t_ch: 反了反了，在左边柜子！不要再拽我的冷凝管了！
t_en: Wrong, wrong, the left cabinet! Stop yanking on my coolant pipes!

t_ch: 黑白猫猫大人！请保佑我寻得一段好姻缘！
t_en: Lord Piebald Catriarch! Please bless me with a wonderful romance!

t_ch: ——似乎有人类正在寻求帮助？
t_en: — Is someone's calling for help?

t_ch: 黑白猫猫大人显灵了！没错，我太渴望爱的拥抱了…或者，我可以抱抱你吗？
t_en: The great Piebald Catriarch has blessed me! That's right, I'm absolutely starving for a loving hug... Or, could I hug you instead?

t_ch: 可我是猫的幻造种，你找到一只猫，希望它能用某种办法带给你爱的抱抱？
t_en: But I'm an imagenae feline. You find a cat and just expects it to somehow give you loving hugs?

t_ch: 是，是的，有什么问题吗？
t_en: Y—Yes, is that a problem?

t_ch: 我们猫不是这么做事的，这样吧，这是一千信用点，你可以拿着它去买条狗。
t_en: That's not how us cats do business. Tell you what, here's a thousand credits. You can use it to go buy yourself a dog.

t_ch: 在街上撞到别人不道歉就想走？你家人没跟你讲过要懂礼貌吗？啊？
t_en: You bump into someone on the street and think you can just walk away without apologizing? Didn't your family teach you any manners? Huh?

t_ch: 对，对不起，我在直播没看路。您有话好好说——
t_en: S—Sorry, I wasn't watching where I was going, I was streaming. Please, let's just talk this out...

t_ch: 跟我道歉干嘛？跟火花花道歉啊！
t_en: Why apologize to me? Apologize to Sparxicle!

t_ch: 啊？
t_en: Huh?

t_ch: 因为你这家伙，我的火花花三十七次公开直播纪念立牌掉到地上了！都粘上灰了不是吗！
t_en: Because of you, my commemorative standee from Sparxicle's <unbreak>37</unbreak>th livestream fell on the ground! It's all covered in dust now!

t_ch: 对不起，火花花大人！
t_en: I'm sorry, Miss Sparxicle!

t_ch: 这就对了。现在我问你，谁才是二相乐园第一偶像？
t_en: That's right. Now let me ask you, who's the number one idol in Planarcadia?

t_ch: 是您！
t_en: It's you!

t_ch: 蠢货！是火花花！
t_en: You idiot! It's Sparxicle!

t_ch: 新制作人的重制版你玩过了吗，怎么样？
t_en: So, have you tried out the new Producer's remake of the game? What'd you think?

t_ch: 快别提了，虽然我还没玩，但我知道它简直烂透了！
t_en: Don't even get me started. I haven't played it yet, but I already know it's absolute garbage!

t_ch: 怎么说？
t_en: What do you mean?

t_ch: 我今天买了两盒放在车里，结果下车买顿饭的功夫，车窗就被人砸了！
t_en: I bought two boxes today and left 'em in my car. I just step out to grab some food and, guess what? Someone smashed my window!

t_ch: 是被人抢了吗？那岂不是代表这作品非常受欢迎？
t_en: So someone already stole it? Doesn't that mean it's super popular?

t_ch: 反了！砸车的人往车里又丢了两盒进去！
t_en: Let me finish! The guy who smashed the window tossed two MORE boxes inside!

t_ch: 七十周年店庆？这家店既没有网红站台，菜品也没什么特色，是怎么在市中心活了这么久的？
t_en: <unbreak>70</unbreak>th anniversary? This place doesn't even have any influencer endorsements, and the food's nothing special. How has it survived in the heart of downtown for so long?

t_ch: 你进去看看就知道了，店里的墙面都是液晶显示屏，全天二十四系统时播放全网最热视频榜单。
t_en: Just head inside and see for yourself. The walls are all LCD screens playing the hottest trending videos from across the net <unbreak>24</unbreak>/7.

t_ch: 幻月游戏时期还会全程直播，全场打折，该他们能赚信用点。
t_en: During the Phantasmoon Games, they'll livestream the whole thing with storewide discounts. That's when they rake in the credits.

t_ch: 二位客人，里面请。
t_en: Right this way, honored guests.

t_ch: 嗯？我还以为你只是陪我来的，难不成机铠也需要吃东西？
t_en: Huh? I thought you were just here to keep me company. Don't tell me mechatrons need to eat too?

t_ch: 不尽然，我们幻造种赖以生存的能量是愿力，而食物里蕴含的愿力微乎其微。
t_en: Not quite. We imagenae rely on Wishpower for survival, and the amount of Wishpower contained in food is negligible.

t_ch: 那…
t_en: So...

t_ch: 我只是馋了。
t_en: I was just craving it.

t_ch: 欢迎收看本期《欢愉一分钟》，让我们采访一下路过的观众朋友们。
t_en: Welcome to this episode of One Minute of Elation! Let's interview some random passersby.

t_ch: 假设你能参加并赢下幻月游戏，你会利用欢愉的权能做些什么？
t_en: Hypothesis: If you could participate in and win the Phantasmoon Games, what would you do with the power of Elation?

t_ch: 颁布法案，把幻造种这个称呼重新变回「妖怪」！
t_en: Pass a law to change the term "imagenae" back to "strangeling"!

t_ch: 让二相乐园的所有电话全部串线几天。
t_en: Scramble all the phone lines in Planarcadia for a few days.

t_ch: 在网上开启一条二次元JUMP专线，让所有产生矛盾的网友都能沿着网线去殴打对方。
t_en: Open up an Interplanar Jump! connection online so anyone beefing with each other can literally crawl through their internet cable and throw hands IRL.

t_ch: 我已经想不出还有什么方法能快速涨粉了，脚踏实地做直播一点意义都没有，我需要爆点。
t_en: I've run out of ideas for boosting my follower count fast. There's no point grinding away the old-fashioned way. I need something that'll really blow up.

t_ch: 扮装成模样相似的知名人物，在镜头前重复招牌动作？
t_en: Dress up as a famous person who looks like you and repeat their signature moves in front of the camera?

t_ch: 这赛道早烂大街了。
t_en: This trend's been done to death.

t_ch: 咬打火机？
t_en: Eat a lighter?

t_ch: 上周刚有个机铠直播主表演过生啃燃气灶，没法比。
t_en: Last week some mechatron streamer literally ate a gas stove live on camera. Can't top that.

t_ch: …我没想法了。
t_en: ...I'm out of ideas.

t_ch: 唉，看来我没有参加幻月游戏的机会了，难道只能回家继承亿万家产了吗？
t_en: Alas, looks like I won't get a shot at the Phantasmoon Games. Guess I'll just have to go home and inherit my billions instead?

t_ch: 幻月游戏将始，欢愉假面落我手，成谒者我愿。
t_en: The Phantasmoon Games draw near. Here I hold the Mask of Elation, and the path to becoming a Supplicant is mine to walk.

t_ch: 剩余工作未结，还在此处白日梦，辞退不再见。
t_en: The work has yet to conclude. Here, you daydream in much fantasy, and your notice of dismissal is served.

t_ch: 好对，好对。
t_en: That's incredible delivery! You really nailed the tone!

t_ch: 我认真的，收拾收拾，明天不用来了。
t_en: I'm dead serious. Pack up your stuff. You don't need to come in tomorrow.

t_ch: 轻柔的风簌簌吹落落叶，满是银杏叶的小路上，自行车铃声叮铃，时而传来欢声笑语。
t_en: A gentle breeze rustles through the leaves, sending them tumbling down. Along the path blanketed with ginkgo leaves, bicycle bells chime, mingling with bursts of laughter and cheerful voices.

t_ch: 在「要迟到了要迟到了」的自言自语中，步履匆匆的两人，就在刚才，在街头拐角相撞了。
t_en: Two people rushing along, both muttering "I'm gonna be late, I'm gonna be late," collided at a street corner just moments ago.

t_ch: 好疼！
t_en: That hurt!

t_ch: 呜哇，突然从拐角冲出来，你有好好看路吗？
t_en: Whoa, you just came barreling around that corner! Were you even watching where you were going?

t_ch: 啊…是你啊。
t_en: Oh... it's you.

t_ch: …是你。又撞见你了呢。
t_en: ...Oh, it's you. We meet again.

t_ch: 是错觉吗？你忽然感到两人间的阳光，仿佛正明媚地跳跃起来。
t_en: Is it just your imagination? You suddenly feel as if the sunlight between the two of them is dancing brightly, more radiant than ever.

t_ch: 抱歉抱歉，没有受伤吧？下一班疾锋龙列车就要错过了，所以我着急了些。
t_en: Sorry, sorry! You're not hurt, are you? I was in a rush. I'm about to miss the next Bullet Wyrm Express.

t_ch: 没有关系，我也走神了。
t_en: No worries, I spaced out too.

t_ch: 弄洒了你的奶茶，真的很抱歉。
t_en: I'm really sorry about spilling your bubble tea.

t_ch: 三秒内捡起来还来得及。
t_en: You've got three seconds to pick it up before it's too late.

t_ch: 作为热心人士，你有必要告知他们这个常识：只要在三秒之内捡起来，细菌就还没反应过来。
t_en: As a helpful citizen, it's your duty to inform them of this common knowledge: If you pick it up within three seconds, the germs won't have had time to react.

t_ch: 这杯奶茶，根本没有洒！
t_en: This bubble tea wasn't even spilled!

t_ch: 要有多幸运，才能让玻璃杯在一次意料之外的相撞中完好无损地立住？
t_en: How lucky is that? For a cup to stay standing, perfectly intact, after running into each other like that?

t_ch: 可是，现在好像已经没有人在乎了。
t_en: But now, it seems like nobody cares anymore.

t_ch: 要不我请你再喝一杯奶茶吧，「无梦咖啡」的新品怎么样？
t_en: How about I treat you to another bubble tea? Wanna try the new stuff at Dreamless Coffee?

t_ch: 好啊。
t_en: Sure.

t_ch: 呵呵，不过…你赶的列车，不是就要错过了吗？
t_en: Hehe, but... aren't you about to miss your Express?

t_ch: 不，就算错过，也好过擦肩而过……
t_en: Consider it missed. But that doesn't mean we have to miss this opportunity...

t_ch: 女孩用手挽住额边的发丝，银杏叶纷纷落下。风起了·。
t_en: The girl tucks a strand of hair behind her ear as ginkgo leaves tumbled down around her. The wind is picking up.

t_ch: 你移开了目光…可能是滚烫的青春灼伤了你的眼睛吧。
t_en: You look away... perhaps the scorching heat of youth has scalded your eyes.

t_ch: 轻柔的风簌簌吹落落叶，满是银杏叶的小路上，自行车铃声叮铃，时而传来欢声笑语。
t_en: A gentle breeze rustles through the leaves, sending them tumbling down. Along the path blanketed with ginkgo leaves, bicycle bells chime, mingling with bursts of laughter and cheerful voices.

t_ch: 在「要迟到了要迟到了」的自言自语中，步履匆匆的两人，就在刚才，在街头拐角相撞了。
t_en: Two people rushing along, both muttering "I'm gonna be late, I'm gonna be late," collided at a street corner just moments ago.

t_ch: 痛痛痛——
t_en: Ow ow ow—

t_ch: 我说你，转弯的时候要好好看路啊……
t_en: Hey, you. Watch where you're going...

t_ch: 唔…是你啊！
t_en: Oh... it's you!

t_ch: …是你？今天也撞见你了呢。
t_en: ...Oh, it's you? So I bumped into you again today, huh.

t_ch: 是错觉吗？你忽然感到两人间的阳光，仿佛正明媚地跳跃起来。
t_en: Is it just your imagination? You suddenly feel as if the sunlight between the two of them is dancing brightly, more radiant than ever.

t_ch: 实在抱歉，你没有受伤吧？我赶着去听宣讲会，所以着急了些。
t_en: I'm so sorry! You're not hurt, are you? I was rushing to catch this presentation, so I was kinda in a hurry.

t_ch: 没关系，我也走神了。撞掉了你的魔法棒，真的很抱歉。
t_en: No worries, I was spacing out too. I'm really sorry for knocking your wand out of your hand.

t_ch: 等等——魔法棒？
t_en: Wait—magic wand?

t_ch: 没什么可奇怪的。
t_en: Nothing weird about that.

t_ch: 没什么可大惊小怪的。如果驾驭不了球棒，那么魔法棒也是不错的选择。毕竟，人总得带点什么防身吧。
t_en: Nothing to freak out about. If you can't swing a bat, then a magic wand's a solid pick. After all, you gotta carry something for self-defense, right?

t_ch: 有很多种可能性…
t_en: There are tons of possibilities...

t_ch: 你的脑海中闪过无数可能性：神秘魔法院校的巫师？正在收集魔法卡片的学生？被契约灵选中的少女？
t_en: Countless possibilities flash through your mind: A wizard from a mystical magic academy? A student collecting magic cards? A girl chosen by a contract spirit?

t_ch: 你、不会是想要成为魔法少女吧？
t_en: You... don't tell me you wanna become a magical girl?

t_ch: 你要去参加的，难道是魔法少女急袭剧团的宣讲会？！
t_en: Wait, don't tell me you're going to a Magical Girl Troupe recruitment session!?

t_ch: 可这么一来，以后想要再见到你，就只能是在观众席上了……
t_en: But that means the only way I'll get to see you after this is... from the audience...

t_ch: 抱歉，我一直想告诉你，但都没有找到适合的机会。
t_en: Sorry, I've been meaning to tell you, but I never found the right moment.

t_ch: 自从第一次看到演出，我就一直憧憬着登上闪耀的舞台，成为魔法少女。你会理解我的，对吗？
t_en: Ever since I saw my first show, I've been longing to step onto that dazzling stage and become a magical girl. You understand, don't you?

t_ch: 你看见男孩仰起头，眼睛里颤动着粼粼波光。是泪水吗？
t_en: You see the boy tilt his head back, a shimmering glint rippling in his eyes. Are those... tears?

t_ch: 你移开了目光…银杏叶纷纷落下。风起了。
t_en: You look away... Ginkgo leaves drift down. The wind picks up.

t_ch: 轻柔的风簌簌吹落落叶，满是银杏叶的小路上，自行车铃声叮铃，时而传来欢声笑语。
t_en: A gentle breeze rustles through the leaves, sending them tumbling down. Along the path blanketed with ginkgo leaves, bicycle bells chime, mingling with bursts of laughter and cheerful voices.

t_ch: 在「要迟到了要迟到了」的自言自语中，步履匆匆的两人，就在刚才，在街头拐角相撞了。
t_en: Two people rushing along, both muttering "I'm gonna be late, I'm gonna be late," collided at a street corner just moments ago.

t_ch: 啊痛痛痛——
t_en: Ow ow ow ow—

t_ch: 你没事吧？实在抱歉，我骑得太快，没能刹住车。
t_en: You okay? My bad, I was going way too fast and couldn't hit the brakes in time.

t_ch: 动漫作为虚构作品，情节大多不够确切。
t_en: Cartoon's fictional, so most of the plot details aren't exactly accurate.

t_ch: 比如，在拐角和你相撞的女孩有时不止叼着面包，还可能骑着自行车。
t_en: For example, the girl who bumps into you around the corner might not just have toast in her mouth, she could also be riding a bike.

t_ch: 咳…你今天，怎么是骑自行车来的？
t_en: Ahem... So why'd you ride your bike here today?

t_ch: 下次你也骑自行车吧。
t_en: Next time, you should ride a bike too.

t_ch: 是啊…我没骑自行车，说明我们还是不够心有灵犀。
t_en: Yeah... I didn't ride a bike, which means we're still not quite on the same wavelength.

t_ch: 你们就非得撞一下吗？
t_en: Did you guys really have to crash into each other?

t_ch: 咳…我们每天都会在这里相撞，这就是默契。
t_en: Ahem... we bump into each other here every day. That's what you call chemistry.

t_ch: 在懵懂的恋情里，默契是比什么都重要的存在！
t_en: In a budding romance, being in sync matters more than anything else!

t_ch: 请答应我…转弯之前要减速慢行，好吗？
t_en: Promise me you'll slow down before taking turns, okay?

t_ch: 呜呜…我答应你！
t_en: *Sob* I promise you!

t_ch: 答应我，昨天的作业借我抄一下，好吗？
t_en: Promise me you'll let me copy yesterday's homework, okay?

t_ch: 咦？呃…我答应你。
t_en: Huh? Uh... I promise you.

t_ch: 答应我，周末一起去逛水族馆，好吗？
t_en: Promise me we'll hit up the aquarium this weekend, yeah?

t_ch: 喂喂？话题怎么会突然拐到这里来？
t_en: Whoa, whoa, whoa? How'd we suddenly end up here?

t_ch: 咳，这是我…最后的愿望了！
t_en: Cough... this is my... final wish!

t_ch: 仔细想想，水族馆我确实好久没有去过了哦？
t_en: Come to think of it, it's been ages since I last went to an aquarium, hasn't it?

t_ch: 只要是和你一起去，就始终有一种新鲜感，就好像是从来没去过一样。
t_en: Whenever I go somewhere with you, it always feels fresh and new, like I've never been there before.

t_ch: 那…就一起去吧。
t_en: Well... let's go together then.

t_ch: 刚刚还满脸痛苦的男孩突然间欢呼起来，银杏叶纷纷落下。风起了。
t_en: The boy, who was just moments ago writhing in agony, suddenly bursts into cheers as ginkgo leaves rain down around him. The wind picks up..

t_ch: 你移开了目光…爱会让人疯狂长出血肉，这话果然不假。
t_en: You look away... Guess it's true what they say: love really does make you feel alive in all the craziest ways.

t_ch: 川流不息的车流涌过大桥，刚分别的二人回头望着对方。
t_en: Traffic surges across the bridge in a never-ending stream. Having just said their goodbyes, the two turn back to catch one last glimpse of each other.

t_ch: 显然这不是一个适合谈话的距离。
t_en: Evidently, this isn't a distance conducive for conversation.

t_ch: 前天，我们去了雷虬电视塔。世界上最温暖的地方在雷虬电视塔上。
t_en: Two days ago, we visited the Thundercoil TV Tower. The warmest spot on earth is right at the top of that tower.

t_ch: 昨天，我们一起去了珠星大厦。有人在通宵加班。
t_en: Yesterday, we went to the Pearluxe Tower. Someone was there, working through the night.

t_ch: 今天，我们一起去看绒绒号FES。
t_en: Today, we're going to the FluffyFEST together.

t_ch: 合金帕姆王很可怕，但和你一起，所以不可怕。
t_en: Alloy King Pom-Pom is pretty scary... but when I'm with you, I don't feel scared at all.

t_ch: 最喜欢你了——
t_en: I like you more than anyone—

t_ch: 明年的今天，可以一起再去星铁FES吗？
t_en: Can we go to the Star Rail FEST together again next year?

t_ch: 车流声淹没了细碎的声音…这是始终无法传达的心意。
t_en: The roar of the traffic drowns out the quiet voices... feelings that, in the end, remain unspoken.

t_ch: ——她到底在说什么啊？
t_en: What is she even saying?

t_ch: 她在说什么呢？
t_en: What's she saying?

t_ch: 川流不息的车流涌过大桥，刚分别的二人回头望着对方。
t_en: Traffic surges across the bridge in a never-ending stream. Having just said their goodbyes, the two turn back to catch one last glimpse of each other.

t_ch: 显然这不是一个适合谈话的距离。
t_en: Evidently, this isn't a distance conducive for conversation.

t_ch: 不在你身边时，我能说会道。但一看到你，我就支支吾吾，说不出一句话。
t_en: I'm quite the yapper when you're not around. But the moment I see you, I can't even string a sentence together.

t_ch: 抱歉，在下就是这样一个笨拙的人。
t_en: Sorry... I guess I'm just clumsy like that.

t_ch: 所以我只能远远地，用这种方式告诉你……
t_en: So the only way I can tell you is like this, from a distance...

t_ch: 我的脑和我的心，还有我全身上下的每一个器官，都无时无刻不在说——
t_en: Every thought in my head, every beat of my heart... every single fiber of my being is screaming it, every second of every day—

t_ch: 我喜欢你！
t_en: I like you!

t_ch: 明年的现在，请和我一起再去星铁FES好吗？
t_en: Will you go to the Star Rail FEST with me again next year?

t_ch: 车流声淹没了细碎的声音…这是始终无法传达的心意。
t_en: The roar of the traffic drowns out the quiet voices... feelings that, in the end, remain unspoken.

t_ch: ——他到底在说什么呀？
t_en: What is he even saying?

t_ch: 他在说什么呀？
t_en: What's he saying?

t_ch: 川流不息的车流涌过大桥，刚分别的二人回头望着对方。
t_en: Traffic surges across the bridge in a never-ending stream. Having just said their goodbyes, the two turn back to catch one last glimpse of each other.

t_ch: 显然这不是一个适合谈话的距离。
t_en: Evidently, this isn't a distance conducive for conversation.

t_ch: 喂喂，听得清吗？
t_en: Hello? Can you hear me?

t_ch: 像清晨的第一个闹铃一样清晰。
t_en: Loud and clear, like a morning alarm.

t_ch: 果然还得是移动电话。科技给人类带来了多少便利啊。
t_en: Mobile phones really are a lifesaver. Technology sure is convenient, isn't it?

t_ch: 终于，可以听到你说出那句话了。
t_en: Finally, I'll get to hear you say it.

t_ch: 那么，就请你听我说出那句话吧——
t_en: Then... I hope you're listening. Here it comes—

t_ch: 明年的今天，要不要一起去星铁FES？
t_en: Want to go to the Star Rail FEST with me again next year?

t_ch: 星铁FES到底何德何能？
t_en: What's so great about the Star Rail FEST anyway?

t_ch: 模糊二维马老师，快给我画！
t_en: Hurry up and draw this, Blurry_QR_Colt!

t_ch: 这句话真的是重点吗？
t_en: Is that really the part we're focusing on?

t_ch: 你们是不是漏了哪一句话呢？
t_en: Aren't you two forgetting to say something?

t_ch: 即便滚滚车流也无法掩盖的心意——科技的力量，真厉害。
t_en: Feelings that even the sound of traffic couldn't hide... The power of technology is truly something else.

t_ch: 喂？听得见吗？
t_en: Hello? Can you hear me?

t_ch: 完完全全听见了！
t_en: Loud and clear!

t_ch: 我梦见巨大的星琼…
t_en: I dreamed of a massive Stellar Jade...

t_ch: 又幻想了？
t_en: Daydreaming again?

t_ch: 你这人真是太好笑了！
t_en: You're so funny!

t_ch: 你说的简直更好笑了！
t_en: That's even more ridiculous!

t_ch: 加点冷笑话，不要搅拌。
t_en: Some dry jokes on ice. Neat, not stirred.

t_ch: 给我来杯一样的。
t_en: Make that two.

t_ch: 你的笑点也太低了吧！
t_en: Your tolerance for jokes is way too low!

t_ch: 你试你也过不了第二关。
t_en: No matter how hard you try, you're not going to make it past level 2.

t_ch: 未成年不能碰地狱笑话。
t_en: Minors aren't allowed to touch terrible jokes.

t_ch: 那来一碗天堂鸡汤？
t_en: How about a bowl of heavenly chicken soup?

t_ch: 不是说愚人节限定吗？
t_en: Wasn't this supposed to be an All Fool's Day exclusive?

t_ch: 怎么今天还能买同款？
t_en: How come I can still buy the same thing today?

t_ch: 因为每天都是愚人节。
t_en: Because every day is All Fool's Day.

t_ch: 在选厕所前，要多想…
t_en: When choosing a bathroom, one must remember...

t_ch: 没关系的，都一样。
t_en: They're all the same, everything stinks.

t_ch: 笑啊，为什么不笑？
t_en: Laugh! Why won't you laugh!?

t_ch: 既然如此，我就不演了…
t_en: In that case, I'll drop the act...

t_ch: 看完不笑的是这个…
t_en: This is the one that didn't make me laugh after I finished watching...

t_ch: 只有我觉得不好笑吗？
t_en: Am I the only one who doesn't find this funny?

t_ch: 我的内心正想要发笑呢！
t_en: I was just about to laugh on the inside!

t_ch: 来杯「今日没品笑话」。
t_en: One glass of Today's Bad Taste Joke.

t_ch: 很有品嘛，这位客人。
t_en: Dear customer, you have such great taste.

t_ch: 你，请支持火花！
t_en: You, please support Sparxie!

t_ch: 火花是谁？
t_en: Who's Sparxie?

t_ch: 你去过收藏室吗？
t_en: Have you been to the collection room?

t_ch: 收藏室？你怕是在说笑吧。
t_en: Collection room? You've gotta be kidding me.

t_ch: 欢迎光临，请随意欢笑。
t_en: Welcome. Please laugh to your heart's content.

t_ch: 全场笑话，任您享用。
t_en: All-you-can-enjoy jokes for you.

t_ch: 欢迎光临，请随意欢笑。
t_en: Welcome. Please laugh to your heart's content.
